SPACE OR TAP TO JUMP
🧠
A game about what makes us human

The Human Element

Run. Jump. Hit question blocks.
You get 10 seconds to spot the human.
Wrong answer or timeout — Game Over.

How to play
⎵ Space / Tap — Jump
❓ Hit a block — A challenge appears
⏱ 10 sec — Pick the human before time runs out
✓ Correct — Keep running, score climbs
✗ Wrong or timeout — GAME OVER
GAME OVER
game points
0
ran out of time
10
